channel.title: Comments on: “Beer America” Pilot/Idea, Part 2, 2004 – Ep. 118
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: Thanks Bobby! I actually just got form Boulder late Sunday night shooting a trailer for Beer America the TV show! The folks pitching us are on a first name bases with all the programmers so I'm hoping to have good news early next year on my show. I've heard of several others being pitched as well, so we should be seeing more shows on beer regardless!
item.content:encoded: Thanks Bobby! I actually just got form Boulder late Sunday night shooting a trailer for Beer America the TV show! The folks pitching us are on a first name bases with all the programmers so I’m hoping to have good news early next year on my show. I’ve heard of several others being pitched as well, so we should be seeing more shows on beer regardless!

item.title: By: Bobby
item.dc:creator: Bobby
item.description: After watching part 1 and 2 of these segments , it's clear to see you were ahead of your time trying to bring a beer themed show to TV. These pilots were very well done. Hope something more comes of your beer america project. I sure do enjoy watching.
item.content:encoded: After watching part 1 and 2 of these segments , it’s clear to see you were ahead of your time trying to bring a beer themed show to TV. These pilots were very well done. Hope something more comes of your beer america project. I sure do enjoy watching.
